summary: Tested all new features: feedback CRUD, rate limiting, resume upload, logo change, hero text, reviews section, footer. 9/10 backend tests passed, 1 failed (contact rate limit via proxy), all frontend features verified.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (429) not triggered when testing via external Kubernetes proxy - IP detection via request.client.host may not capture real client IP. Works for /api/feedback (likely because feedback rate limit is lower at 3). Possibly need X-Forwarded-For header parsing.

action_items: Consider using X-Forwarded-For header for IP detection in check_rate_limit() to ensure rate limiting works correctly behind Kubernetes proxy/ingress. Update: client_ip = request.headers.get('X-Forwarded-For', request.client.host if request.client else 'unknown').split(',')[0].strip()
critical_code_review_comments: check_rate_limit uses request.client.host which returns proxy IP behind K8s ingress. Should use X-Forwarded-For header for real client IP - critical for rate limiting to work in production.
seed_data_creation: Test feedback records created during testing (TEST_Client, RL_Test entries in feedback collection)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: logo='My Portfolio', MOTION GRAPHIC DESIGNER larger text, Client Reviews section with star ratings and form, footer logo updated, Reviews navbar link, feedback CRUD API, resume upload with auth. Rate limiting works in-memory but may not enforce per-real-client-IP behind K8s proxy (X-Forwarded-For issue). Test session: session_token=test_session_admin_fixed works for auth.
rca_of_issue: Rate limit contact endpoint: check_rate_limit() uses request.client.host which returns the K8s ingress proxy IP (same for all requests), so all requests appear from same/different IP. The rate limit store key is 'ip:endpoint' but if multiple test requests come from different proxy IPs or same proxy IP is shared, the count never reaches max_requests=5 in the 7-request test. Fix: parse X-Forwarded-For header.
